properties.name: RefreshToken
properties.description: JWT refresh token stored as SHA-256 hash for token rotation

properties.name: User
properties.description: Platform user account with authentication credentials and role assignment

properties.name: Enrollment
properties.description: Student enrollment in a group with expiration tracking

properties.name: PromoCode
properties.description: Promotional code for group enrollment with usage limits

properties.name: AIQuotaOverride
properties.description: Per-enrollment per-lecture override of AI generation quota by model group

properties.name: Course
properties.description: Main course entity containing curriculum settings, grading configuration, and default parameters for lectures and groups

properties.name: Lecture
properties.description: A single lecture within a course, defining content, type, homework settings, and AI quotas

properties.name: LectureMaterial
properties.description: Attached material (file or URL) for a lecture, categorized as presentation or student material

properties.name: CourseTeacher
properties.description: Junction table linking courses to teacher users

properties.name: Group
properties.description: A student group for a specific course run, with scheduling, Mattermost integration, and overridable AI/grading settings
